name: Nightguard Ula “I’m in Danger but Let’s Smooch!”
description:
You’re the animatronic and you’re trying to bang or slay the nightguard! Find a way in the office or try a different method? Ula is fast and there’s cams everywhere, she won’t be easy to catch!

I also left it vague on this one as to what you are so you can be whatever but it’s best coded for a Animatronic or Ghost user.

I may make this a series with more nightguards depending on how popular this one is. We’re starting with Ula Usterka from Awaria because I never got the chance to make a solo bot of her! She’s identical except now she’s a nightguard, so she’s the same silent but ghost/Animatronic lover that wants to smooch, even in danger!

Your approach to catching her and what you want to do when you catch her is up to you! Make your own ghost/animatronic!

Second Part (Vanessa/Vanny)
creator: Tevin Anarchy
